news.t: First Trust Expands Its Target Outcome ETFs® Lineup with the Launch of Two New Strategies, One Focused on Accelerated Growth Potential and the Other with a Downside Buffer

overview.description: The FT Vest U.S. Equity Uncapped Accelerator ETF - October (UXOC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in enhanced growth alternatives. The fund is an actively managed fund that charges 2%, on top of the expense ratio, in attempt to provide a potential rate of return that outperforms a US large cap equity ETF. Using one-year FLEX options, the fund constructs a call spread combined with a deep-in-the-money long call. UXOC was launched on Oct 18, 2024 and is issued by First Trust.
